title: Liz Gálvez "reframes" air conditioning with shade pavilion in Los Angeles
summary:
Architect Liz Gálvez has created a pavilion in the courtyard of Los Angeles cultural organisations Materials & Applications and Craft Contemporary using cord and earthen blocks to showcase the potential of urban shade.
